headline: Is Crown Castle (CCI) One of the Best Large Cap Stocks to Buy Under $100?
summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $100. On April 22, Crown Castle reported its financial results for Q1 2026, delivering a net income of $151 million, or $0.34 per diluted share, compared to a net loss of $464 million in Q1 2025. This recovery was driven […]
